description_long: This is a sleek, modern sports car with a streamlined body painted in a light blue color, adorned with various logos such as PlayStation, Xbox, and Photoshop, giving it a custom, tech-inspired appearance. The car features a low, aerodynamic profile with a wide front grille, sharp headlights, and a prominent black racing stripe running from the front to the rear. The side view reveals two doors, black-tinted windows, and red-accented, multi-spoke wheels that add a sporty flair. At the rear, a large red spoiler and quad exhausts emphasize its high-performance design, while the Audi badge is visible above the license plate area. The roof and hood are decorated with additional branding and decals, enhancing its unique, eye-catching look. The overall build suggests a lightweight yet robust construction, typical of high-end sports cars designed for speed and agility.
description: A light blue, custom-branded sports car with a black racing stripe, red spoiler, and multi-spoke black wheels, featuring tech and gaming logos across its sleek, aerodynamic body.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide grille, sharp headlights, black racing stripe, and PlayStation branding on the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the two-door coupe design, Xbox and Photoshop logos, black-tinted windows, and red-accented wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the large red spoiler, quad exhausts, Audi badge, and continuation of the black racing stripe.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with visible tech logos, two doors, and sporty wheel design.
attribute_wheel_design: multi-spoke black rims with red accents
